case_title: U-SAVE PLUMBING & HARDWARE INC VS. SUN SHING COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON SEP-12-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF LOST CONTRACT FILED BY PLAINTIFF U-SAVE PLUMBING & HARDWARE INC

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF U-SAVE PLUMBING & HARDWARE INC AS TO DEFENDANT SUN SHING COMPANY DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-13-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-14-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-28-2006

AMENDED SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF U-SAVE PLUMBING & HARDWARE INC SERVED JUN-18-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SUN SHING COMPANY

PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF JAN-17-2007, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
